introSection: Zippin Pippin was a wooden roller coaster at Libertyland built by National Amusement Device Company and Harry C. Baker.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was demolished in early 2010.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 1 train with 4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Zippin Pippin was a wooden roller coaster at Libertyland built by National Amusement Device Company and Harry C. Baker.

The ride was demolished in early 2010.



1 train with 4 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 24 riders per train.
